public_sources.name: Companies House officer appointments
evidence_summary: R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd is listed as active with company number NI696693.
Gary Leckey is listed as an active director appointed on 26 April 2023.
The company context supports applicant identity and governance background for grant records.
grant_use: Use to support applicant identity, company/director context, and governance background.
Do not use as evidence of route-specific eligibility, partner commitment, budget, permits, export-control status, or financial capacity.
exclusions: Not evidence of IFS route-specific eligibility.
Not evidence of partner commitment, budget, site permissions, permits, export-control position, or financial capacity.

public_sources.name: ORCID public record
evidence_summary: ORCID iD 0009-0004-2792-4649 is associated with Gary Leckey.
The profile presents research around harmonic systems, quantum-consciousness integration, energy systems, aerospace propulsion, and applied harmonic technology.
The record includes public researcher links and open research outputs, including Zenodo DOI entries.
grant_use: Use to support researcher identity, persistent public profile, research themes, and open research output routing.
Do not present profile metadata as independent technical validation or partner endorsement.
exclusions: Not independent peer review by itself.
Not evidence of IFS partner eligibility, budget, permit, export licence, or award-term acceptance.

public_sources.name: ResearchGate public profile
evidence_summary: The profile identifies Gary Anthony Leckey as Research Director at Aureon Institute.
The profile presents a public research biography and skills in probability, data analysis, computational learning, adaptive systems, and related methods.
The profile shows a substantial public publication count, useful for narrative context but not for route eligibility by itself.
grant_use: Use to support public research activity, role description, publication volume, and domain narrative.
Do not treat profile statements as peer-review, grant eligibility evidence, or independent validation unless separately evidenced.
exclusions: Not proof that any current IFS partner-led route has an eligible lead, site, asset, or budget.

public_sources.name: RA-CONSULTING GitHub organisation
evidence_summary: The public organisation identifies Aureon Institute as the research department of R&A Consulting.
The organisation hosts public repositories including aureon-trading.
The aureon-trading repository is public, Python-based, and has public stars/forks visibility, supporting open-source software evidence.
grant_use: Use to support open-source/software evidence, repository visibility, and technical implementation narrative.
Do not treat repository presence as proof of commercial traction, external partner access, or validated performance.
exclusions: Not proof of validated model performance, commercial sales, or external partner commitment.
Not evidence for partner-led IFS eligibility gates without separate partner records.

public_sources.name: Academia public profiles
evidence_summary: Academia profiles provide public distribution and research narrative context for Gary Leckey and Aureon Institute.
Use only as supplementary public-profile evidence behind primary local artifacts, ORCID, source code, and official registers.
grant_use: Use as a public distribution/profile channel and supplementary research narrative source.
Do not use as high-weight eligibility or validation evidence without primary sources.
exclusions: Not independent validation or proof of collaborator commitment.

public_sources.name: R&A Consulting public research page
evidence_summary: Applicant-controlled public research page can provide a stable external reference for the Aureon research programme where it matches local evidence.
Use as a public narrative channel, not as independent validation.
grant_use: Use as an applicant-controlled public research reference where it matches local evidence.
Class as self-published; do not use as independent validation.
exclusions: Do not use as independent validation.
Do not use for route-specific partner, budget, permit, export, or finance claims.

public_sources.name: Public social/outreach channels listed from researcher profiles
evidence_summary: Social channels may evidence public outreach or dissemination only where a funder explicitly asks for it.
They are excluded from the formal IFS evidence base unless a later route-specific pack deliberately selects and sanitizes them.
grant_use: Use only for public-outreach context if a route specifically asks for dissemination channels.
Avoid in formal IFS attachments unless needed and sanitized.
exclusions: Do not cite in formal IFS technical or eligibility answers unless necessary.
Do not use for technical validation, eligibility, budget, partner, permit, or finance claims.

source_quality_controls: Use Companies House and other official registers as primary identity/governance evidence.
Use ORCID as persistent researcher identity and public profile metadata, not as independent validation.
Use ResearchGate and Academia only as public profile and dissemination evidence unless backed by primary outputs.
Use GitHub repositories as public software/source evidence, not as proof of partner commitment or technical performance.
Use applicant-controlled websites and social channels as low-weight public narrative or outreach evidence only.
route_gate_controls: No public profile source unlocks eligible partner lead, research institute, TTO authorization, 4 FTE evidence, site/asset ownership, permissions, safety case, permits, export licence, Project Impact, budget, match funding, repayment capacity, or award-term acceptance.
Do not submit active IFS routes from this evidence alone.
Do not enter binary legal/export declarations from public profile evidence.
Do not invite partners, upload files, send emails, accept terms, or press final submission from this index.
privacy_and_secret_controls: This index uses public profile and public register facts only.
No plaintext passwords, bank details, tax identifiers, private keys, tokens, national insurance numbers, or private finance files are copied.
Public email addresses from profile pages are deliberately excluded from this index unless a later outreach pack receives exact action-time approval.
